findings.title: Repeated RDP Authentication Accepted
findings.summary: Repeated TerminalServices 1149 success events from the same remote source indicate accepted interactive RDP access and can reflect hands-on lateral movement.
findings.recommended_next: Correlate these 1149 events with nearby 4624 LogonType 10 sessions, interactive process creation, and any tunnel or port-forwarding activity from the same source.
